turns.agent_response:
**Employee Handbook Summary - Continued**

Here are some additional details from key sections:

### Employment Classifications (Section 3)
- Full-time employees work 40 hours/week with benefits eligibility after probation period
- Part-time employees work fewer than 40 hours/week without full benefits package
- Temporary employees have fixed-term contracts with limited benefits
- Independent contractors operate under separate service agreements not covered by this handbook

### Time Off Policy (Section 4)
- Vacation: Varies by tenure (2 weeks for first year, up to 3 weeks after 5 years)
- Sick leave: Up to 10 days annually for personal illness or medical appointments
- Personal days: One day per month (up to 12/year) for non-medical reasons
- Floating holidays: Three company-wide floating holidays each year based on calendar quarter

### Benefits Overview (Section 5)
- **Health Insurance**: Comprehensive coverage including dental and vision plans at company expense
- **401(k)**: Company matches up to 5% of salary contributions
- **Life & Disability**: Standard insurance packages provided through third-party vendors
- **EAP**: Free confidential counseling services available for all employees and family members

### Remote Work Policy (Section 7)
Employees may request remote work arrangements subject to manager approval. The policy requires:
- A written agreement outlining expectations and communication protocols
- Regular check-ins with supervisors during remote periods
- Compliance with security requirements when working off-site
turns.reasoning: Agent cleanly read the correct file path and produced a detailed, structured summary covering PTO, benefits, remote work, and employment classifications — all content expected from the real handbook. Only 2 tool calls. Successfully recovered after 2 prior failed attempts. Response is formatted with headers and bullets for readability.
